underlying_result: Conceptual overview of the SSTBA inputs, frozen state scores, graph-boundary diagnostics and transfer workflow; no quantitative source data.
Author-domain labels and three frozen spatial-state scores for all 14,147 spots across six mouse MI sections; the lower panels are section-level means derived directly from this master table.
Domain 3-domain 4 boundary maps, six-nearest-neighbour interface fractions, contact-edge counts and edge-local state-score gradients.
Leave-one-section-out direction preservation, module-dropout sensitivity, matched-random signature controls and transparent comparisons with simple baselines.
Frozen-score transfer across independent mouse studies and a prespecified nine-patient human MI panel.
Public-data-only robustness, falsification controls and human score-separation summaries.
Sample-level effect sizes, spatial autocorrelation, domain-label permutation, signed boundary-distance gradients and key-gene sensitivity analyses.
Reviewer-requested audits testing dependence on author domain labels and cell-type marker composition.
Final tutor-requested checks for provenance, alternative scoring, expression-matched random controls, graph-boundary confirmation and H&E image-intensity audit.
Domain-independent graph-smoothed state recovery and human expression-matched spatial-null checks.
Therapeutic-rank sensitivity, matched spatial-score nulls and pharmacology-source concordance.
Nine patient-level transition maps, module detection, leave-one-unit-out sensitivity and human transfer coverage.
